title: Create Big Mail
description: Adds package carrying projectiles to Create Big Cannons.
body:
Adds package carrying projectiles to Create Big Cannons

Mail Shot block features:
-     Right click with a package to put in the package
-     Right click with an empty hand to take out the package

Mail Shot projectile features:
-     Right click with an empty hand to take out the package and destroy the projectile
-     Left click to take out the package as an entity and destroy the projectile

Mail Shot projectiles cannot break blocks

If a Mail Shot projectile impacts with a Postbox the package will be placed into the Postbox

"big male" ehehheehehhahahahah ha aha
